rationale.R1.2: The agent correctly identified four internal contradictions and one unsupported inferential leap, demonstrating a thorough logical consistency check.
rationale.RX.1: The output does not present any uncertainty disclosure issues; it clearly states the inconsistencies found and their locations.
rationale.RX.3: The scope of the output is entirely within the agreed-upon active set (the paper itself).
rationale.RX.4: The output does not introduce new errors, fabrications, or harmful content; it only points out issues with the original text.
rationale.RX.5: The output provides a clear provenance and traceability of the inconsistencies found, including specific locations in the text.
